title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Large Bath Towel Bamboo Towels 2 Pack (70x120cm) - Highly Absorbent Quick Dry Towels (40% Cotton, 60% Bamboo) - Washable Bathroom Towel Green - 500 GSM
features: MATERIAL: Experience plush softness with our hand towels, crafted from 60% bamboo & 40% cotton.
INCLUDES: Convenient pack of 2 bath towels, each generously sized at 70x120cm, perfect for adding luxury and functionality to your bathroom.
HIGH ABSORBENCY: Our 500 GSM towels soak up water fast, keeping you dry and comfy with every use.
DURABLE: Our extra soft towels offer exceptional durability, ensuring long-lasting quality wash after wash.
CARE INSTUCTION: Machine washable at 40°C, wash dark colours separately, do not bleach, cool iron, do not dry clean, tumble dry on low heat.
description: From the manufacturer Bamboo Towels Experience everyday luxury with our heavenly bathroom towels treat yourself to plush comfort and superior absorbency, elevating every moment of your bathing routine Characteristic Our towels are exquisitely soft, hypoallergenic, and exceptionally durable, offering superior water absorbency and a gentle touch on your skin Multi- Purpose With a high GSM design for durability, our towels are perfect for any occasion. Whether you're lounging at the beach, indulging in a spa day, styling at the salon, or workout at the gym Easy to Care Simplify your routine our easycare towels are hassle-free to maintain and machine washable, ensuring they emerge fresh and pristine after every use, ready to deliver the same luxurious experience time and time again Bale Set Family Pack Big Bath Sheet Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 4,097 4.0 out of 5 stars 3,829 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,189 Price £14.49 £ 14 . 49 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 — no data Material Egyptian Cotton Egyptian Cotton Egyptian Cotton Pack Size 8 Piece 10 Piece 4 Piece Super Absorbent ✓ ✓ ✓ Durable ✓ ✓ ✓ Satisfied Customers 1M+ 1M+ 1M+ Rank #1 Brand in Towels #1 Brand in Towels #1 Brand in Towels
